summary: Static validation of CI/CD config (deploy.yml, firebase.json, .gitignore, CI-CD.md) plus smoke test of preview app. All 9 requested checks PASS. Preview app fully functional: login API returns 200, sets httpOnly+Secure access_token/refresh_token cookies, /api/auth/me returns 401 without cookies and 200 with them, UI redirects to dashboard and renders stats correctly with no console errors.

static_checks.frontend_job_level_env_REACT_APP_BACKEND: ${{ needs.deploy-backend.outputs.url }} (set at job-level env, not just step)
static_checks.firebase_deploy_flags: --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project ${{ env.PROJECT_ID }} (resolves to dee-eppn-plataforma via top-level env)

critical_code_review_comments: deploy.yml: in the Cloud Run --set-env-vars line, JWT_SECRET/ADMIN_PASSWORD/EMERGENT_LLM_KEY are interpolated directly into the shell command. If any secret contains a comma it would be split across env vars. Consider passing via --set-secrets from Secret Manager or escaping. Not blocking for current secrets.
deploy.yml: deploy-frontend re-runs on every push to main even when only backend changed; the design choice is acceptable (URL stability) but doc note in CI-CD.md is accurate.
Strip-predeploy step uses node -e inline; minor maintainability concern but works correctly and is well commented.
seed_data_creation: None created; used existing seeded admin and 7 students.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration validated only CI/CD config changes (YAML/JSON/gitignore/docs) plus a non-destructive smoke test against the preview URL. No real deploy was attempted to GCP/Firebase (no credentials available). Backend (port 8001) and frontend (port 3000) are running under supervisor and the public preview at https://escola-admin-6.preview.emergentagent.com is healthy. If a future iteration tests the actual deploy, ensure GCP_SA_KEY secret has the IAM roles listed in /app/CI-CD.md.
